commands.name: loglevel
commands.summary: Show or set the sb log level.

body.text: Operator surfaces over the kernel truth sources (manifest registry, lifecycle, log levels).
Spam / invite / caps / mention / duplicate filtering — decisions are pure engine rules.

settings.hint: Enable the cross channel spam rule.
settings.name: cross_channel_spam_enabled

settings.hint: Messages inside the window that count as spam.
settings.name: spam_count

settings.hint: Comma list of exempt role ids.
settings.name: exempt_roles

settings.hint: Comma list of exempt channel ids.
settings.name: exempt_channels

body.text: Channel operations (create/clone/lock/slowmode/…) — the ops port arms with the discord adapter slice.
Prohibited-word filter + message-hygiene sweeps.

commands.name: community
commands.summary: Open the Community hub — XP, Karma, and community activities.

commands.name: community
commands.summary: Open the Community hub (XP, Karma, and community games).

body.text:
Pick a community feature below.
**Progression** — 🏆 XP · ✨ Karma
**Standings** — 📊 Leaderboards · 🌟 Spotlight
*Community games (Counting, Word Chain) join with the games band.*

commands.name: spotlight
commands.summary: Show the Community Spotlight — live XP, coins, games, and level-ups.

body.text: Live server activity — leaders, level-ups, and game stats.
Select a game below to view its leaderboard.

selectors.empty_state: 🎮 Game leaderboards arrive with the games band (mining, RPS, deathmatch, counting…).

body.text: Live member-count channels (total · humans · bots).

commands.name: diagnostics
commands.summary: Platform status: lifecycle, findings, declarations, AI health.

body.text: Platform status from the kernel truth sources (lifecycle, findings ring, declaration registry, AI collector).

commands.name: economymenu
commands.summary: Open the interactive economy control panel.

commands.name: economy
commands.summary: Open the Economy hub (daily, work, shop, balance).

commands.name: daily
commands.summary: Claim your daily reward. Higher streaks unlock better odds!

commands.name: work
commands.summary: Work a job and earn coins + XP (1 h cooldown).

commands.name: shop
commands.summary: Browse and buy items from the shop.

commands.name: balance
commands.summary: Show your (or another user's) current coin balance.

commands.name: joblist
commands.summary: Show all jobs, requirements, and your mastery.

body.text: Daily rewards, jobs, the item shop, and transfers — every coin movement rides the audited seam and the economy_audit_log money trail.

Choose a job below.
Pay increases **+1%** each time you work the same job (max +100%).

selectors.empty_state: ❌ No jobs available. Earn XP or buy items from 🛒 Shop.

body.text: Buy items to unlock higher-tier jobs. Purchases are unique — one of each per member.

settings.hint: Live feed of daily rewards, work earnings, transfers, and shop purchases.
settings.name: log_channel

settings.description: Operator-facing audit channel for economy mutations. Recommended for any guild that runs the economy actively.

settings.hint: Internal registry-version stamp — the upgrade hook prunes orphan overrides when the registry moves. Managed by the platform, not operator-facing.
settings.name: governance_version

settings.hint: Role granting the `trusted` visibility tier (ISSUE-015). Holders see trusted-tier surfaces without any Discord permission. 0 = unset.
settings.name: trusted_tier_role_id

settings.hint: Role granting the `moderator` tier (ADR-008 — capability-native moderation authority without the matching Discord permissions). 0 = unset.
settings.name: moderator_tier_role_id

commands.name: help
commands.summary: Everything the bot can do, generated from its manifests.

body.text: Everything the bot can do, from its own manifests.
Provider-scored image screening (sexual/violence/harassment/hate).

settings.hint: Master switch — images leave the guild for scoring.
settings.name: enabled

settings.hint: Comma list of exempt role ids.
settings.name: exempt_roles

settings.hint: Comma list of exempt channel ids.
settings.name: exempt_channels

commands.name: inventory
commands.summary: Show your (or another user's) unified inventory hub.

body.text: The unified item browser — one catalogue across economy, mining, fishing, and collectibles, grouped by category, rarest-first. Select a category below to view details.

commands.name: thanks
commands.summary: Give a karma point to a helpful member.

commands.name: karma
commands.summary: Show your karma (peer reputation) — or another member's.

settings.hint: Master switch for karma. When off, !thanks / !karma add politely decline. On by default.
settings.name: enabled

settings.hint: How long a member must wait before thanking the same recipient again (seconds). The main anti-farm guard. 0 disables the cooldown.
settings.name: cooldown_seconds

settings.hint: Maximum karma grants one member can give per rolling 24 hours.
settings.name: daily_cap

settings.hint: React-to-thank: set an emoji (e.g. ✨) and reacting with it grants karma to the message's author — same cooldown and daily cap as !thanks. Empty = off (the default).
settings.name: reaction_emoji

commands.name: leaderboard
commands.summary: Show a leaderboard (xp/coins/karma/… — game boards join with the games band).

body.text: Select a category below to view the leaderboard.

commands.name: set
commands.summary: Bind a log slot to a channel.

body.text: Operator log routing: `!logging status` / `enable` / `set <slot> #channel` / `routes` / `test`.

settings.hint: One combined events channel, or one per category.
settings.name: event_routing

settings.hint: Comma list of channel ids never logged.
settings.name: ignored_channels

settings.hint: Comma list of user ids never logged.
settings.name: ignored_users

settings.hint: Cleanup log channel (falls back to mod).
settings.name: cleanup

commands.name: warn
commands.summary: Warn a member (escalates at the threshold).

body.text: Warn / timeout / kick / ban lanes run through the audited seam; policy below resolves per-guild → global → shipped defaults.

settings.hint: Warnings before the escalation action runs.
settings.name: warn_threshold

settings.hint: Timeout length applied by the warn escalation.
settings.name: warn_timeout_minutes

settings.hint: Comma list of actions that DM the member.
settings.name: dm_actions

settings.hint: Days of messages swept on ban.
settings.name: ban_delete_message_days

settings.hint: Sweep the actioned member's recent messages.
settings.name: post_action_cleanup

settings.hint: Max messages scanned by the post-action sweep.
settings.name: post_action_cleanup_limit

settings.hint: Which actions post to the public log channel.
settings.name: public_log_actions

body.text: Raid detection + account-age screening on member join.

settings.hint: Joins inside the window that count as a raid.
settings.name: raid_join_count

settings.hint: Slowmode applied during a raid (0 = none).
settings.name: raid_slowmode_seconds

settings.hint: How long a raid lockdown holds.
settings.name: raid_lockdown_seconds

settings.hint: Screen accounts younger than the minimum age.
settings.name: age_enabled

body.text: Guild configuration overview — per-subsystem hubs hang off this menu.
Per-subsystem configuration. Every value resolves per-guild explicit → global explicit → default.

commands.name: setup
commands.summary: Guided server setup: presets, channels, roles, moderation, review.

body.text: The setup wizard's sections, ordered by the registry (A-9). Interactive flows arm per-section as they port.

commands.name: treasury
commands.summary: Open the server treasury — view the pool and contribute coins.

commands.name: contribute
commands.summary: Donate your own coins into the server treasury.

commands.name: grant
commands.summary: Disburse coins from the treasury to a member (managers only).

body.text: The server's shared coin pool. Everyone can **Contribute** their own coins to grow it; server managers disburse from it with `!treasury grant @member <amount>`.
Member greetings, farewells, and the optional entry role (the A-14 join gate anchor).

settings.hint: Post a greeting on member join.
settings.name: join_enabled

settings.hint: Post a farewell on member leave.
settings.name: leave_enabled

settings.hint: DM new members a welcome message.
settings.name: dm_enabled

settings.hint: A-14 screening input: minimum account age.
settings.name: min_account_age_days

settings.hint: Auto-delete the greeting after N seconds (0 = keep).
settings.name: delete_after_seconds

settings.hint: Role granted on join — the A-14 deny-until-role gate's role source.
settings.name: entry_role

commands.name: xpmenu
commands.summary: Open the XP panel showing your rank and quick admin actions.

commands.name: rank
commands.summary: Show rank in a category (xp/coins/both or any leaderboard category).

commands.name: givexp
commands.summary: Give XP to a user (admin only).

commands.name: resetxp
commands.summary: Reset a user's XP to zero (admin only).

commands.name: xpimport
commands.summary: Import XP/levels from another bot's level-up channel (raise-only, preview first).

body.text: Chat to earn XP and level up. `!rank` shows your card; admins configure via the settings hub.

settings.hint: Minimum XP awarded per qualifying message.
settings.name: xp_min

settings.hint: Maximum XP awarded per qualifying message.
settings.name: xp_max

settings.hint: Seconds between XP awards per user. Zero disables the cooldown (not recommended in active guilds).
settings.name: xp_cooldown

settings.hint: Channel where level-up announcements post. Leave unbound to announce where the level-up happened.
settings.name: announce_channel

settings.description: Dedicated channel for level-up announcements. Optional — XP announces in-place when unset.
